en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: sasaṟux la wa! sunṟahu’ cu la.
en: Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: rex ṟamagal soni’, mahnguw cuxan la, hata magluw salahaw aw?
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧?
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: ho’ ga! hata’ syaw na luling.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: rex tugal cuxan, hata’ salahaw boru’ cuxan gaben aw?
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧?
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: pahngagan rex cuxan, maha’ min kiyokay ci yaya’ mu.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi’, muxal ka labos mu, maha’ cu mastanux.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: anak cu musa’ mema’ ci aba’ ga?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: usa’ kira’ haṟi la, pahnguw ta’ haṟi la.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi’, muxal ka tunux mu, pahnguw cu gaben la.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: ho’, katox haṟi musa’ su’ moṟow.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi’, pahnguw cu babuw rex utux hani, maha’ cu paktox ising.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: ho’, bale’ malahang ci hi’ su’.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Iwal?

ab: muxal ka labos ni, cel mastanux.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Temu?

ab: sinsi’, cel muxal na olu’ ka Temu, mahnguw soni’.
en: Teacher, Temu has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Temi come?
She has a fever.
